reasoning: The key limiter for Koren is improving lactate clearance and building a stronger aerobic base. The last ride averaged 157.2W, which shows potential for ramping up efforts. Today, we focus on over-unders that replicate the demands of the Alpine Loop's challenging climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Repeat 6 sets of 3 minutes at 242-256W, then 3 minutes at 201-218W, simulating sustained climbs with variable effort

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
